zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger De Leicester於大約1278年出生在英國爾瑟 塔波時，他的父親Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight29歲，母親Lady Margaret de Dutton24歲。他於1316年與Joyce Isabel在英國爾瑟 塔波結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1349年在英國爾維頓哈爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger De Leicester于大约1278年出生在英国爾瑟 塔波时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight29岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Dutton24岁。他于1316年与Joyce Isabel在英国爾瑟 塔波结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1349年在英国爾維頓哈爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leicester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Leicester (Leics).

variants.name: Lisseter
meanings: English:  see  Leicester  .

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lessiter
meanings: English:  see  Leicester  .

variants.name: Lassiter
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Leicester (see   Lester  ). This name has been long established in North America, and occurs in a wide variety of forms.

variants.name: Lasseter
meanings: English: variant of Lassiter (see Lester ).

variants.name: Lestor
meanings: English:  see  Leicester  .

variants.name: Leister
meanings: English: variant of   Lester  .
German: occupational name for a maker of lasts or a cobbler, from Middle High German leist + the agent suffix -er.

variants.name: Leycester
meanings: English:  see  Leicester  .

variants.name: Laister
meanings: English:  see  Leicester  .

variants.name: Lassetter
meanings: English: variant of Lassiter (see Lester ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger De Leicester was born about 1278, in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight, was 29 and his mother, Lady Margaret de Dutton, was 24. He married Joyce Isabel in 1316, in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1349, in Wettenhall, Cheshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger De Leicester est né environ 1278, à Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Dutton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joyce Isabel en 1316, à Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1349, à Wettenhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger De Leicester um 1278 in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight 29 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret de Dutton 24. Er hat 1316 in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England Joyce Isabel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1349 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Wettenhall, Cheshire, England.

Lui sposato Joyce Isabel nel 1316, nel Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1349, nel Wettenhall, Cheshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger De Leicesterが約1278年にイギリスチェシュアイアネスエル タブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knightは29歳，母Lady Margaret de Duttonは24歳であった。1316年にイギリスチェシュアイアネスエル タブリーでJoyce Isabelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1349年にイギリスチェシュアイアウエッテンハルで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Leicester(이)가 대략 1278년 영국 체실르 네터 타블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Dutton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1316년 영국 체실르 네터 타블리에서 Joyce Isabel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1349년 영국 체실르 w텐홀에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Leicester nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret de Dutton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joyce Isabel em 1316, em Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1349, em Wettenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger De Leicester родился около 1278 г. в местности нетир табли, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas de Leycester, Knight было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Dutton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce Isabel в 1316 г. в местности нетир табли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1349 г. в местности веттенолл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.
